text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You mean birthdays rock, yeah? I think I'm
starting to get the hang of your "marvelous"
usage...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Tonight, we're having a sleepover party in
Marvey's room!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I know you're saying that it's gonna be super
exciting, but don't forget that your room is also
my room.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I haven't heard anything about a sleepover party.
Are you guys gonna make a racket the entire
night?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? So we can't have a sleepover?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... D-don't give me those puppy eyes... All
right, fine, you can have your sleepover!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes, I know you love me... And I'm grateful
for it.
